import geopandas as gpd
from shapely.geometry import Polygon

# Three city-block-sized squares (300 m) laid out around the Chicago Loop
# in EPSG:3395 (World Mercator, metres). Realistic Mercator coords are
# required so that AutkMap's auto-fit camera lands on something visible.
cx, cy = -9752000, 5137000
size = 300
gap = 600
squares = [
    Polygon([(cx, cy), (cx + size, cy), (cx + size, cy + size), (cx, cy + size)]),
    Polygon([(cx + gap, cy), (cx + gap + size, cy), (cx + gap + size, cy + size), (cx + gap, cy + size)]),
    Polygon([(cx, cy + gap), (cx + size, cy + gap), (cx + size, cy + gap + size), (cx, cy + gap + size)]),
]
gdf = gpd.GeoDataFrame(
    {'value': [10, 20, 30], 'geometry': squares},
    crs='EPSG:3395',
)
gdf.metadata = {'name': 'demo'}

return gdf
